ham.subject: Your Recent Bank Transaction - Confirmation
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We are writing to confirm that a transaction of $500.00 was made from your account on 2026-04-10 at 14:32 UTC. The transaction was processed at the following merchant: "ABC Retail Corp."

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately by clicking the link below or calling our 24/7 support line.

<URL>

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Customer Support Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Purchase
spam.body:
To: Executive Team
From: CFO Office
Subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Purchase

Dear Executive Team,

We have an upcoming client event scheduled for next week and I need to purchase a $1,500 gift card on behalf of the company to secure the venue. Please approve the purchase and provide the corporate card number at your earliest convenience.

Failure to comply will delay the event and may result in loss of client goodwill. Kindly confirm by clicking the link below.

<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
Chief Financial Officer
